ar_265: How do you use the Al Tayyar application? 🛵
ar_266: Understand the Al Tayer system in 3 simple and excellent steps
ar_269: Choose the service (food🛒, parcel📦, going to come🔄) and write your order. You can record a voice note or upload a picture to facilitate the explanation to the pilot!
ar_271: Choose the price and the pilot 🤝
ar_272: Nearby representatives will compete for your order and suggest customized delivery rates. Compare their prices and ratings, and accept the best offer for you!
ar_275: After acceptance, chat with the captain with excellent chat, track the representative’s itinerary live on the map, and deliver safely via QR code.
